rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.2091 governs a registry of school safety/security consultants. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative intersection.
quote: Sec. 37.2091. REGISTRY OF PERSONS PROVIDING SCHOOL SAFETY OR SECURITY CONSULTING SERVICES.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and the school safety consultant registry statute.
